---
title: "Introduction to KoboToolbox"
format: pptx
---

## What is KoboToolbox?

- A platform for creating complex, logic-driven surveys and quizzes.
- Uses the XLSForm standard.
- Ideal for structured data collection and quantitative research.

## Key Features

- Advanced Logic & Skip Logic: Uses the 'relevant' column to show/hide questions based on previous answers.
- Grouping & Organization: Uses 'begin_group' to organize questions into logical sections.
- Automated Scoring: Supports 'calculate' types with 'if'-statements for self-grading quizzes.
- Flexible Data Types: Supports text, dates, multiple-choice, and more.

## Technical Structure (XLSForm)

- Survey Sheet: Defines the survey behavior (columns: type, name, label, required, appearance, relevant, calculation).
- Choices Sheet: Defines options for multiple-scale questions (columns: list_name, name, label).

## Use Cases

- Educational Assessments: Creating topic-based quizzes (e.g., Economics).
- Quantitative Research: Designing structured questionnaires and survey sheets for statistical analysis.
